title:
AN ACT CREATING BARRIO MABUNAW IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL, PROVINCE OF
ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 864 / 67 OG No. 36, 7041 (September 6, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6197, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO MABUNAW IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL, PROVINCE OF

ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Mabunaw in Barrio Nangca, Municipality of Rizal, Province of Zamboanga del Norte, is separated from said barrio, and constituted into a distinct and independent barrio in said municipality, to be known as Barrio Mabunaw.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
